'''thashacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:deacetyllanatoside|deacetyllanatoside]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-sh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deacetyllanatoside|deacetyllanatoside]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thashacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæshæchæth|thæshæchæth]] || [[word:thæshæchæj|thæshæchæj]] || [[word:thæshæchæsh|thæshæchæsh]] || [[word:thæshæchæ|thæshæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thashashachath|thashashachath]] || [[word:thashashachaj|thashashachaj]] || [[word:thashashachash|thashashachash]] || [[word:thashashacha|thashashacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashachath|thashachath]] || [[word:thashachaj|thashachaj]] || [[word:thashachash|thashachash]] || [[word:thashacha|thashacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashafchath|thashafchath]] || [[word:thashafchaj|thashafchaj]] || [[word:thashafchash|thashafchash]] || [[word:thashafchaf|thashafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thashachatha|thashachatha]] || [[word:thashachaja|thashachaja]] || [[word:thashachasha|thashachasha]] || [[word:thashachaka|thashachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thashachath|thashachath]] || [[word:thashachaj|thashachaj]] || [[word:thashachash|thashachash]] || [[word:thashacha|thashacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thashachathal|thashachathal]] || [[word:thashachajal|thashachajal]] || [[word:thashachashal|thashachashal]] || [[word:thashachakal|thashachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thashachathatha|thashachathatha]] || [[word:thashachajaja|thashachajaja]] || [[word:thashachashasha|thashachashasha]] || [[word:thashachaka|thashachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thashachathan|thashachathan]] || [[word:thashachajan|thashachajan]] || [[word:thashachashan|thashachashan]] || [[word:thashachakan|thashachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thashachathaoro|thashachathaoro]] || [[word:thashachajaoro|thashachajaoro]] || [[word:thashachashaoro|thashachashaoro]] || [[word:thashachakaoro|thashachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
